name: Classic Lasagna
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook lasagna in a large pot of boiling water until just tender; drain most of the water and add ice cubes to stop cooking. Allow lasagna to stand in cold water to prevent pasta from sticking together.
2. In a saucepan, brown ground beef with onion and garlic. Drain off excess fat.
3. Cover and cook over low heat for about 5 minutes.
4. Stir in mushrooms with the liquid, tomato spaghetti sauce, tomato paste, salt, and oregano. Simmer for 15 minutes.
5. In a separate bowl, combine egg with spinach, creamed cottage cheese, and grated parmesan cheese.
6. Spread one-third of the meat sauce in a 13x9 inch baking dish.
7. Cover with about five overlapping strips of lasagna.
8. Alternate another third of sauce and one-fourth of lasagna.
9. Spread the spinach mixture over the pasta and cover with one-fourth of lasagna strips.
10. Top with remaining sauce and lasagna.
11. Arrange sliced mozzarella cheese on top.
12. Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes. Let stand for 10 minutes before serving.
